/usr/bin/ar qc libautopark_lib.a CMakeFiles/autopark_lib.dir/database.c.o CMakeFiles/autopark_lib.dir/driver.c.o CMakeFiles/autopark_lib.dir/vehicle.c.o CMakeFiles/autopark_lib.dir/order.c.o CMakeFiles/autopark_lib.dir/report.c.o CMakeFiles/autopark_lib.dir/utils.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libautopark_lib.a
